analyze.title: MirrorMe
analyze.subtitle: Get your outfit rated
analyze.uploadSub: Tap to choose a photo from your gallery
analyze.tip1: Full body shot shows the complete outfit
analyze.tip3: Avoid heavy filters or extreme crops
analyze.tip4: Stand in front of a plain background
analyze.disclaimer: AI results are generated automatically and may not be 100% accurate. Clothing detection, color matching, and style scores can vary. Please treat results as helpful suggestions, not definitive judgments.
analyze.cameraPermissionMsg: Please allow camera access to take photos.
analyze.galleryPermissionMsg: Please allow photo library access to pick photos.
analyze.monthlyLimitMsg:
You've used all 100 Premium scans for this month.
Your limit resets on the 1st of next month.
analyze.noPersonMsg: We couldn't find a person in this photo. Please upload a photo of yourself wearing an outfit.
analyze.noOutfitMsg: Please upload a full-body or upper-body photo showing your outfit clearly.

history.title: History
history.noAnalysesSub: Upload your first outfit to get started!
history.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this analysis? This cannot be undone.

profile.title: Profile
profile.signOutConfirmMsg: Are you sure you want to sign out?
profile.devBuildMsg: Subscriptions require a native build. RevenueCat is not available in Expo Go.

wardrobe.title: My Wardrobe
wardrobe.noItemsSub: Analyze an outfit and your clothing pieces will appear here automatically.
wardrobe.addItemMsg: Choose a photo source to add a new clothing piece.
wardrobe.categoryRequiredMsg: Please enter a category for this item.
wardrobe.removeError: Could not remove item. Please try again.
wardrobe.saveFailedMsg: Could not update this item. Please try again.
wardrobe.noItemDetectedMsg: Could not detect a clothing item in this photo. Try a clearer photo of a single piece.

onboarding.statsSub: Optional — helps us give more accurate advice
onboarding.errorMsg: Could not save your profile. Please try again.

results.saveFailedMsg: Could not update this item. Please try again.
results.categoryRequiredMsg: Please enter a category for this item.

login.verifyEmail: Please verify your email before signing in.
login.verificationResent: Verification email resent. Check your inbox and spam folder.
login.resendFailed: Could not resend. Please try again later.
login.errorInvalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address
login.errorTooManyRequests: Too many attempts. Please try again later

register.title: Create Account
register.subtitle: Join MirrorMe and elevate your look
register.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 6 characters
register.emailInUse: An account with this email already exists
register.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address
register.checkInboxMsg:
We sent a verification link to
{{email}}.
Tap the link, then sign in.
If you don't see it, check your spam folder.

forgotPassword.title: Reset Password
forgotPassword.tagline: Enter your email to receive a reset link
forgotPassword.noAccount: No account found with this email address
forgotPassword.wentWrong: Something went wrong. Please try again
forgotPassword.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address
forgotPassword.tooManyRequests: Too many attempts. Please try again later
forgotPassword.checkInboxMsg:
We sent a password reset link to
{{email}}.
Follow the link to reset your password.

settings.title: Settings
settings.deleteWarningBody: This will permanently delete your account and all associated data including:
settings.confirmPasswordMsg: Enter your password to confirm account deletion.
settings.finalConfirmMsg: Are you sure you want to permanently delete your account and all your data?

premiumGate.title: Go Premium ✨
premiumGate.subtitle: You've used your free scans for this week. Upgrade to keep analyzing your outfits.
premiumGate.devBuildMsg: Subscriptions require a native build. RevenueCat is not available in Expo Go.

social.appleFailed: Apple sign-in failed. Please try again.
social.appleNoToken: Apple sign-in failed: no identity token received. Please try again.
social.methodNotEnabled: This sign-in method is not enabled. Please contact support.
